Our Story

Rooted in the heart of India's most famous wholesale market — Sadar Bazar, Delhi — Shree Narayan Jewellers has been a trusted name for resellers, retailers, and jewellery lovers across the country.

About Us

Where Tradition Meets Elegance

At Shree Narayan Jewellers, we believe every piece of jewellery tells a story. Located at the iconic Krishna Market in Sadar Bazar — India's largest wholesale market — we offer an unparalleled range of jewellery that combines traditional craftsmanship with modern design sensibilities.

From intricate anti-tarnish rings starting at just ₹9, to stunning Bahubali earrings, Korean-inspired designs, bangles, necklace sets and trending jewellery — we cater to individual buyers, resellers, and large wholesale clients alike. Minimum orders, maximum value.

Premium Quality Guaranteed
Anti-tarnish, long-lasting materials that look gold always.
New Designs Every Week
Fresh trending stock arrives weekly — Korean, bridal, everyday & seasonal collections.
Wholesale Pricing
Direct from manufacturer. Rings from ₹9, earrings from ₹14. Bulk discounts available.

Why Choose Us

The Shree Narayan Promise

Pan India Delivery

We ship across India. Order from anywhere in the country and receive your jewellery securely packed at your doorstep.

Wholesale Pricing

Direct from our workshop floor. Rings from ₹9, earrings from ₹14. The best wholesale rates in Delhi — guaranteed.

Trusted Quality

All our jewellery is anti-tarnish, long-lasting and made with premium quality materials. What you see is exactly what you get.

New Designs Weekly

Fresh stock every week — Korean jewellery, bridal sets, trending styles, seasonal collections. Always something new to offer your customers.

Simple Process

How To Order

1

Browse Designs

Browse our designs on Instagram @shreenarayanjewellers2451 — or simply WhatsApp us what you need and ask if it's available. We'll confirm stock instantly.

2

WhatsApp & Pay

Send your order on WhatsApp 8826276208. We'll send you the total amount and our UPI payment details. Pay securely via UPI / PhonePe / GPay.

3

Receive Your Order

Your order is packed and dispatched. Orders placed before 3:00 PM are shipped same day. Orders after 3 PM are dispatched next working day. Pan India delivery.

Place Order on WhatsApp
